query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
## Summary

**The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure available as of late June 2026 was 3,138,394 acres**, reported in the **Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) dated Tuesday, June 30, 2026 – 0730 MDT** (the final IMSR issued in June, reflecting activity through June 29).

Key details:
- **Exact YTD acres: 3,138,394**
- **Date: June 30, 2026** (0730 MDT report)
- YTD wildfires: 35,884
- The national total had crossed 3 million acres between the June 27 report (2,951,605 acres) and June 30.
- 2026 was running at **159% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average** for acres burned.

For context only (these are July, not late-June figures): the July 12 IMSR showed 3,578,017 YTD acres, and NIFC's live Statistics page showed 3,586,194 acres as of July 13, 2026. The authoritative late-June figure the question asks for is **3,138,394 acres as of June 30, 2026**.

sources.snippet: Year-to-date Acres Burned 3,586,194; Year-to-date Wildfires 39,090. Last Updated Monday, July 13, 2026 (context, July figure).

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report Sunday July 12, 2026 - 0730 MDT
sources.snippet: TOTAL ACRES: 3,578,017; TOTAL FIRES: 38,956 (context, July figure).

key_facts: Latest NIFC YTD acres burned as of late June 2026: 3,138,394 acres, per the IMSR dated Tuesday June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT).
The June 30, 2026 IMSR also reported 35,884 year-to-date wildfires nationwide.
The June 30 report reflects fire activity through June 29, 2026 (reported the morning of June 30).
The prior weekend report (Saturday June 27, 2026) showed 2,951,605 YTD acres and 35,424 fires; the national total crossed 3 million acres between June 27 and June 30.
As of June 30, 2026, YTD acres were 159% of the 2016-2025 ten-year average (avg 1,977,688 acres) and YTD fires 133% of average.
Regional YTD leaders as of June 30: Rocky Mountain 1,297,880 acres, Southern Area 1,041,805 acres, Great Basin 378,140 acres.
For context (July, not late June): July 12, 2026 IMSR showed 3,578,017 YTD acres; NIFC Statistics page showed 3,586,194 acres updated July 13, 2026.
On June 28, 2026, three firefighters (two USFS, one U.S. Wildland Fire Service) were fatally injured responding to the Knowles fire west of Grand Junction, CO.
